scripts.release:verify: pnpm run release:build && pnpm --filter @keys2design/whds-ui typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter storybook typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/design-registry typecheck && pnpm --filter docs build
scripts.release:pack: rm -f packages/ui/*.tgz && pnpm run release:verify && pnpm -C packages/ui pack
scripts.publish:ui: pnpm run release:pack && sh -c 'cd packages/ui && npm publish ./keys2design-whds-ui-*.tgz --access public'
